name: TSAB
taglineEn: TSAB brings Telugu students in Bhopal together through friendship, culture, shared opportunities, and meaningful support. We are building a community where students can feel at home, stay connected, and grow together.
headlineEn: A home for Telugu students in Bhopal
heroSupportingText: Community, culture, opportunities, and support — all in one place.
missionStripEn: Together we stand. Together we grow.
description: TSAB is a student-led community for Telugu students in Bhopal. It brings students together through culture, support, opportunities, and shared growth.

homeThemes.title: Community
homeThemes.description: Meet Telugu students across Bhopal, make friends, and feel at home through a strong and welcoming network.

homeThemes.title: Opportunities
homeThemes.description: Discover internships, jobs, events, resources, and updates that support your academic and professional journey.

homeThemes.title: Culture & Heritage
homeThemes.description: Celebrate Telugu language, festivals, traditions, and identity through events that bring people together.

homeThemes.title: Support & Growth
homeThemes.description: Learn from seniors, share experiences, and build confidence through a student community that grows together.

aboutIntro.title: TSAB is a student-led community for Telugu students in Bhopal.
aboutIntro.accentTe: మన సంస్కృతి, మన బంధం, మన ఎదుగుదల
body: TSAB is a student-led community for Telugu students in Bhopal. It exists to help students feel connected, supported, and represented while building a strong network across campuses and institutions.
We bring students together through events, culture, opportunities, achiever stories, and community support. For many members, TSAB is more than a group — it is a familiar space away from home.
aboutIntro.whoCanJoinBody: Any Telugu student in Bhopal who wants to connect, participate, contribute, and grow with the wider community.
aboutIntro.familiarSpaceBody: TSAB gives students a place to belong. It helps them stay close to Telugu identity while also finding support, friendships, and opportunities.

aboutMissionPoints: Build a strong and welcoming community
Create a family-like environment away from home
footerTaglineEn: Community, culture, opportunities, and support for Telugu students in Bhopal.
